title: SnifferBar
description: Changes your hotbar to a snifferbar :D
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0b7a004a40aa77855cc132ca1517319c0848661.png)

# **English:**

Changes the texture of the hotbar and many buttons in the settings and menu to the sniffer texture and makes it look as nice as possible.

# **Español:**

Cambia la textura de la hotbar y muchos botones en la configuración y el menú a la textura del sniffer y lo hace ver lo mas bonito posible.

by italoo :D
